FR-01.title: Student Enrollment
requirements: Online admission form with personal and academic details
Document upload for transcripts and ID

FR-03.title: Attendance Tracking
requirements: Attendance reports by student and class

FR-04.title: Timetable Management
requirements: Create weekly timetable for each class
Assign subjects and teachers to time slots
Timetable visible to students and parents

FR-05.title: Exam and Grade Management
requirements: Create exams with subjects, dates, and marks

FR-07.title: Parent Portal
requirements: Parents view child's attendance and grades

FR-09.title: Library Management
requirements: Catalog books with ISBN, title, author
Student book borrowing and return tracking

FR-11.title: Announcement and Events
requirements: Admin publishes announcements to all or specific classes

FR-12.title: Admin Dashboard and Reports
requirements: Overview of total students, teachers, and revenue

FR-01.title: Plan Student Enrollment Workflow and Contracts
FR-01.description: Review the SRS requirement bullets for student enrollment and break them into executable API, UI, data, security, and reporting subtasks. Define the workflow states, user roles, field-level validations, request/response contracts, and failure cases before implementation starts. Use these requirement drivers as the baseline: Online admission form with personal and academic details; Document upload for transcripts and ID; Enrollment fee payment.
acceptance_criteria: The end-to-end workflow for student enrollment is documented from trigger to completion
Validation rules, role restrictions, and error scenarios for student enrollment are explicitly defined
Implementation subtasks for student enrollment can be picked up independently by engineering

FR-01.title: Implement Student Enrollment Backend Services
FR-01.description: Build the backend services for student enrollment on Angular, ASP.NET Core, SQL Server. Create route handlers or service endpoints, model the core business operations, enforce validation and authorization rules, persist workflow state changes, and add structured error handling and audit logging. Make sure the implementation covers these behaviors: Online admission form with personal and academic details; Document upload for transcripts and ID; Enrollment fee payment.
acceptance_criteria: Core student enrollment business rules are implemented for School Management System
Validation, authorization, and error handling are covered for student enrollment
API/service behavior for student enrollment is testable and documented for integration

FR-01.title: Implement Student Enrollment Frontend Flow
FR-01.description: Build the frontend flow for student enrollment with the exact forms, tables, filters, wizards, status indicators, and action buttons required by the SRS. Connect the UI to the backend contract, handle optimistic updates or refresh flows where needed, and provide user-facing validation, permissions feedback, loading states, and recovery states.
acceptance_criteria: The student enrollment user flow is accessible and responsive across supported browsers
Forms, filters, tables, and feedback states for student enrollment behave correctly
The student enrollment UI is fully integrated with backend APIs and handles loading and error states

FR-01.title: Design Student Enrollment Persistence Model
FR-01.description: Design the persistence layer for student enrollment. Identify the core entities, relationships, indexes, status fields, history/audit tables, and reporting attributes required to support the workflow. Add migrations and seed or fixture data where that helps engineering validate the feature early.
acceptance_criteria: The persistence model for student enrollment supports required workflows and reporting needs
Indexes, constraints, and relationships for student enrollment are defined correctly
Migrations for student enrollment can be applied safely in target environments

FR-01.title: Integrate External Dependencies for Student Enrollment
FR-01.description: Implement the external integration points used by student enrollment, such as third-party APIs, SSO, messaging gateways, payment rails, import/export pipelines, or bank feeds. Add retry-safe behavior, timeout handling, observability, and fallback behavior for downstream failures.
acceptance_criteria: External dependencies used by student enrollment are connected through stable integration layers
Timeout, retry, and failure handling for student enrollment integrations are implemented and testable
Secrets, credentials, and integration logs for student enrollment are handled securely

FR-01.title: Harden Student Enrollment Security and Access Rules
FR-01.description: Apply security controls to student enrollment. Implement role checks, field-level protections, data masking where appropriate, secure defaults, audit trails, and abuse-prevention rules. Verify that sensitive operations are guarded both in the API layer and in the UI visibility rules.
acceptance_criteria: Access control rules for student enrollment are enforced consistently across API and UI layers
Sensitive operations and data paths in student enrollment are audited and protected against misuse
Security validation for student enrollment passes review and automated checks

FR-01.title: Write Student Enrollment Automated and End-to-End Tests
FR-01.description: Write unit, integration, and end-to-end tests for student enrollment. Cover valid flows, invalid inputs, permission failures, state transitions, data integrity checks, and regression-prone edge cases pulled from the SRS. Add fixtures or mocks that make the feature verifiable in CI and local development.
acceptance_criteria: Happy path and failure cases for student enrollment are covered by automated tests
Permission checks and validation rules for student enrollment are verified
Regression coverage exists for the most critical student enrollment scenarios
